Name: Collision Repair Revenue
Description: Income from collision repair, bodywork and paint jobs

Name: Parts Purchases
Description: Auto parts purchased for collision repair jobs (panels, bumpers, lights)

Name: Paint & Refinish Supplies
Description: Automotive paint, primer, clear coat and refinish materials

Name: Shop Supplies & Consumables
Description: Sandpaper, masking, tape and general shop consumables

Name: Edison Federal CU - Business Checking
Description: Operating checking account at Edison Federal Credit Union

Name: Accounts Receivable
Description: Outstanding customer and insurance repair balances awaiting payment

Name: Accounts Payable
Description: Outstanding vendor bills for parts and paint not yet paid

Name: Sales Tax Payable
Description: New Jersey sales tax collected on parts and materials pending remittance

Name: Tools & Equipment Expense
Description: Spray guns, sanders, frame tools and shop equipment maintenance

Name: Retained Earnings
Description: Accumulated net earnings for Hari's Auto Body & Paint LLC

Name: Towing & Sublet Services
Description: Towing, alignment and sublet repair services for collision jobs

Name: Shop Utilities & Rent
Description: Oak Tree Road shop rent, electricity and gas for spray booth

Name: Body Labor Income
Description: Labor revenue for dent repair, panel work and frame straightening.

Name: Paint Labor Income
Description: Labor revenue for paint matching, refinishing and clear coat.

Name: Insurance Claim Income
Description: Repair income billed to insurance carriers on approved claims.

Name: Detailing & Buffing Income
Description: Income from detailing, buffing and paint correction services.

Name: Glass & Trim Income
Description: Income from windshield, glass and trim replacement work.

Name: Bumper Repair Income
Description: Income from bumper repair, replacement and paint blending.

Name: Storage & Diagnostic Fees
Description: Vehicle storage and collision diagnostic estimate fees.

Name: Supplemental Repair Income
Description: Supplemental charges approved after teardown on collision jobs.
